In the Margins

Last updated April 2026

📖 Reading

Dinner at the Night Library, by Hika Harada

🍵 Steeping

Chinese black tea with lavender and vanilla

🎮 Playing

Tomodachi Life

🌿 Thinking about

What does it mean to be human in a world filled with AI? There's clearly something, so how do we articulate it and preserve it?

✝️ Meditating

James 1 – the meaning of endurance
